childhood.familyBackground: Born as the eldest son of Hanwha Group chairman Kim Seung-youn. His mother is the only daughter of former Minister of the Interior Seo Jeong-hwa. Eldest grandchild of Hanwha founder Kim Jong-hui. Has two younger brothers: Kim Dong-won (born 1985, president of Hanwha Life) and Kim Dong-seon (vice president of Hanwha Galleria).
childhood.education: Attended the prestigious St. Paul's School boarding school in the United States for high school. Graduated from Harvard University with a Bachelor of Arts degree in Political Science.
childhood.earlyLife: Kim Dong-kwan was an exceptional student from childhood, consistently ranking first in his class at Apgujeong Middle School (formerly Gujeong Middle School). He was sent to the elite American boarding school St. Paul's before attending Harvard, building a strong international network that would later serve his global business ambitions.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 한화그룹 김승연 회장의 장남으로 태어남. 어머니는 서정화 전 내무부장관의 고명딸. 한화 창업주 김종희의 장손. 두 남동생이 있음: 김동원(1985년생, 한화생명 사장)과 김동선(한화갤러리아 부사장).
childhood.educationKo: 미국 명문 사립기숙학교 세인트 폴 고등학교 졸업. 하버드 대학교 정치학 학사(Bachelor of Arts) 학위 취득.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 어린 시절부터 공부를 매우 잘해 압구정중학교(구 구정중학교)에서 전교 1등을 놓치지 않음. 미국 명문 기숙학교 세인트 폴에서 고등학교를 다닌 후 하버드에 진학, 이후 글로벌 사업 야심에 기여할 강력한 국제적 네트워크를 구축.

careerTimeline.event: Enlisted in the Republic of Korea Air Force as an officer candidate (117th class), serving as an interpreter officer until December 2009
careerTimeline.eventKo: 대한민국 공군 학사장교 117기로 입대, 2009년 12월까지 통역장교로 복무

careerTimeline.event: Joined Hanwha Group as a deputy department head (chahkjang) in the chairman's office
Appointed CEO of Hanwha Solutions' Strategy Division, taking on direct management responsibilities
careerTimeline.eventKo: 한화솔루션 전략부문 대표이사로 선임, 직접적인 경영 책임을 맡음

careerTimeline.event: Promoted to Vice Chairman of Hanwha Group, also serving as CEO of Hanwha and Hanwha Aerospace Strategy Division
careerTimeline.eventKo: 한화그룹 부회장으로 승진, 한화 및 한화에어로스페이스 전략부문 대표이사도 겸임

careerTimeline.event: Appointed CEO of Hanwha Impact Investment Division, leading the MASGA (Make Space Great Again) project encompassing defense, space, and hydrogen energy
careerTimeline.eventKo: 한화임팩트 투자부문 대표이사로 선임, 방산·우주·수소에너지를 아우르는 MASGA 프로젝트를 주도

personalTraits.knownFor: Next-in-line chairman of Hanwha Group, Korea's 7th-largest conglomerate. Harvard-educated eldest son of chairman Kim Seung-youn, he is driving Hanwha's transformation into a global defense, aerospace, and clean energy powerhouse. Spearheaded the MASGA (Make Space Great Again) strategy covering defense systems, space launch vehicles, and hydrogen energy. Named 2025 CEO of the Year by Hankyung Business for his execution leadership. Oversees four major affiliates as CEO of their strategy divisions.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 한국 재계 7위 한화그룹의 차기 총수. 하버드 출신의 김승연 회장 장남으로, 한화를 글로벌 방산·우주·클린에너지 강자로 변신시키는 것을 주도. 방위 시스템, 우주 발사체, 수소에너지를 아우르는 MASGA(Make Space Great Again) 전략을 주도. 실행 리더십으로 한경비즈니스 2025 올해의 CEO로 선정. 4개 주요 계열사의 전략부문 대표이사로 경영을 총괄.

sajuConnection.note: This field will be written by us. Leave null.
